outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war oil shock pushes US inflation to 3.3%. It's expected to get worse
outlets.summary: March CPI surges to 3.3% on war-driven oil shock. Gasoline +21.2% in one month. Consumer sentiment at record low.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: After Trump pauses war, Iranians fly flags of victory not surrender
outlets.summary: WaPo reports Iranians celebrating ceasefire as victory despite massive destruction. Flags and celebrations in Tehran streets.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth declares 'decisive military victory' in Iran: Trump 'forged this moment'
outlets.summary: Fox frames Hegseth's Pentagon briefing as vindication — CENTCOM dismantled Iran's military in under 40 days using 10% of US combat power.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: CENTCOM Chief: 'Iran Has Suffered a Generational Military Defeat'
outlets.summary: Breitbart amplifies Gen. Caine's briefing — 40-year military build-up 'crushed in under 40 days.' 13,000+ targets struck.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Shipping in Strait of Hormuz at a standstill despite US-Iran ceasefire
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera reports only 9 vessels transited Hormuz in 24h despite ceasefire — zero oil tankers. 600+ ships stranded.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Israeli strikes on Lebanon risk unravelling US-Iran ceasefire, EU warns
outlets.summary: EU's Kallas warns from Riyadh that Israel's continued Lebanon strikes threaten to destroy fragile ceasefire deal.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hezbollah fires missile at southern port of Ashdod as IDF strikes launchers in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Hezbollah's deepest strike yet targets Ashdod naval base — 90 miles from border. IDF responds by striking 10+ launchers.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Hezbollah Rockets Cause Heavy Damage; IDF Continues Strikes in Southern Lebanon
outlets.summary: 30 rockets hit northern Israel — Misgav Am house, Deir al-Asad school damaged. IDF continues offensive in south Lebanon.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran declares 'historic victory' — enemy forced to accept its proposal
outlets.summary: PressTV frames ceasefire as Iran's total victory. Enemy 'forced to accept' 10-point proposal. Demands reparations.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: President Pezeshkian: Iran will never abandon Lebanon in face of Israeli aggression
outlets.summary: Iranian president vows solidarity with Lebanon despite ceasefire. Warns Israeli strikes 'violate temporary truce.'
